reviews.review_description: I love this game! It is $17 to play then $31/m BUT in my opinion definitely worth it if you need to improve your nursing skills! I am struggling to find where I can find my grades for completed cases but it’s definitely realistic and definitely fun. It was kinda stressful starting out because I’m still early in my nursing program so some stuff I didn’t know but for the most part it’s definitely a learning experience. Definitely enjoying the game regardless. Good luck to those who are trying ! 🩷🩷
If this is for medical students then don’t release to the public. Or at least don’t advertise it as free if you have to pay monthly.

As soon as you load in your view is obstructed by a big panel asking for login info. No fair! I wanted to inject 100x the lethal dose of some chemical into a patient with a fractured elbow or something!
i paid like 17 dollars for it but it wont let me log in

reviews.review_title: It is not in fact free.
reviews.review_description: It is listed as free on here and in the website, but you gotta make an account and sign up for a membership to play the game? This is false advertising.
Why make it a free game to download if you have to pay to play it anyways?
